name: blob-decode-all-padding-chars
comment: Edge case hand-picked (not fuzzer-generated) because both ports agree on it: a string of only '=' padding characters passes the shared validation (its length is a multiple of 4) and decodes to zero bytes in both. Kept as a guard against over-tightening the validation that rejects genuinely malformed input like 'abc' - see blob-decode-unpadded-rejected.
